summary: Reference context is complete. Both relevant specs (config-schema.md and compiler-driver.md) cover the affected areas. config-schema.md is the primary MambaConfig spec; compiler-driver.md documents the driver's CompilerConfig and its project_config field that holds MambaConfig. No gaps or irrelevant specs.

compiler-driver.md documents the driver's use of MambaConfig via project_config field and already notes removal of duplicate from driver/config.rs — high relevance is correct
